channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: French local elections highlight barriers facing the far-right Rassemblement National in major cities
item.description: In the second round of French local elections held on 22 March 2026, the far-right Rassemblement National (RN), led by Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella, achieved historic results by securing control ...

item.title: Challenges in Developing Effective Dengue Vaccines Amid Rising Cases
item.description: Dengue fever, spread by Aedes mosquitoes, is increasingly affecting populations across Africa, Asia, and Latin America. In Kenya and other African countries like Tanzania, Sudan, Senegal, and Côte d’I...

item.title: NASA's Artemis II Mission: Crew to Travel Farther Than Any Human Before
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission, set to launch as early as April 1, 2026, will mark a historic journey. Four astronauts, including Commander Reid Wiseman, Pilot Victor Glover, and Mission Specialists Christ...

item.title: The rise of looksmaxxing and its impact on young men's insecurities about appearance
item.description: In this opinion piece, Jason Okundaye explores how young men and boys are grappling with insecurities about their physical appearance amid the rise of the 'looksmaxxing' trend. He begins by reflecting...

item.title: Ruto Launches Blue Economy Projects in Siaya to Revive Lake Victoria Region
item.description: President William Ruto has rolled out several multi-billion shilling projects in Siaya County aimed at transforming the Lake Victoria region’s economy. The government has committed KSh1 billion to fis...

item.title: Sindh government considers smart lockdown to conserve fuel amidst Middle East crisis
item.description: Sindh's Local Government Minister Nasir Hussain Shah has announced that the provincial government is considering imposing a smart lockdown as a measure to conserve fuel amidst the ongoing Middle East ...

item.title: Modi, Trump discuss West Asia situation; India urges peace and safe navigation through Hormuz Strait

item.title: US official calls India indispensable partner for Indo-Pacific balance and defence cooperation

item.title: Fatal Trailer Accident in Ibadan Kills Three, Leaves Many Injured
item.description: A tragic accident involving a trailer occurred in Ibadan, Oyo State, leaving at least three dead and many others injured. The incident, which is suspected to have been caused by brake failure, happene...

item.title: Brad Pitt Reportedly Seeks to End Long-Running Legal Dispute with Angelina Jolie
item.description: Brad Pitt is reportedly ready to end his lengthy legal dispute with ex-wife Angelina Jolie, signaling a move toward resolution after nearly a decade of conflict. The Hollywood pair, who met during the...

item.title: Fahmia Selemani: Acting Head of Northern Zone at COPRA shaping Tanzania's cereal and produce regulation
item.description: Fahmia Amiri Selemani serves as Acting Head of the Northern Zone at the Cereal and Other Produce Regulatory Authority (COPRA) in Tanzania. She oversees operations across seven zones and 14 regions, wo...

item.title: Glass-Based Quantum Chip Enables High-Speed Secure Communication
item.description: Researchers from the University of Padua, Politecnico di Milano, and the CNR Institute for Photonics and Nanotechnologies have developed a novel quantum communication device using borosilicate glass. ...

item.title: Pakistan Offers to Mediate US-Iran Talks Amid Ongoing Middle East Conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has expressed that Pakistan is honoured to facilitate discussions between the United States and Iran to try and bring an end to the ongoing war in the Middle East. He cla...

item.title: Pakistan's Army Chief Plays Key Role in Peace Talks Between US and Iran
item.description: Pakistan's army chief, Asim Munir, has been actively working to mediate between the US and Iran in an attempt to end the ongoing conflict. In a significant development, Munir spoke with former US Pres...

item.title: Who is the Key Figure in Iran the U.S. is Negotiating With?
item.description: In the midst of rising tensions between the United States and Iran, President Donald Trump has mentioned that the U.S. is in talks with a 'top person' in Iran's leadership, though he did not reveal th...
